ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Strategic_Consultant', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.Type, 'Renewal')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.Type, 'Upsell')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.Type, 'New Sale')) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Solution Consulting requests can be created for New Sale, Upsell and Renewal opportunities only
